doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Formulation of New Five-Year Plan Restart KTC vision 2030 and Measures to Realize Capital-Cost and Stock-Price-Conscious Management

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営の実現

summary_en: ROE target 8.0%+ by FY3/31 (end-2031). New 5-year plan 2026–2030 introduced to realize capital-cost and stock-price-conscious management. Detailed metrics in attached materials.
summary_jp: FY3/31（2031年度末）までにROE 8.0%以上を達成。資本コスト・株価意識経営実現に向け新5ヵ年計画2026-2030を策定。詳細は別紙参照。
tag_en: COC Initial - ROE 8.0%+ by FY3/31 - New 5-Year Plan 2026–2030
tag_jp: 資本コスト意識経営 初期設定 - ROE 8.0%以上（FY3/31目標） - 新5ヵ年計画2026-2030
